name: Gallup
description_short: Gallup Federal Credit Union is a not-for-profit credit union serving Gallup employees and their immediate family members with competitive rates on savings, loans, and mortgages.
description_long:
Gallup Federal Credit Union operates as a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving employees of Gallup and their immediate family members. The credit union emphasizes its mission to provide safe, sound financial services while promoting financial wellbeing through quality products, member education, and professional service. As a credit union, Gallup FCU is NCUA-insured and maintains a membership-based model rather than a shareholder-driven structure.

Gallup FCU offers a comprehensive range of financial products including savings accounts (0.75%-2.25% APY), certificates of deposit (1-Year CDs at 3.00% APY), auto loans (new at 4.87% APY, used at 5.20% APY), personal loans (8.99% APY), mortgages, and checking accounts. The institution actively promotes refinancing opportunities, including auto loan refinancing with rate reductions up to 1.00% APR. Members can access financial wellbeing resources, budgeting guidance, financial planning services, and home buying education. Monthly direct deposits of $1,000 or more waive standard banking fees.

What distinguishes Gallup FCU is its strict membership eligibility tied to Gallup employment—only full- and part-time Gallup employees and their immediate family members can join. The credit union emphasizes lifetime membership: once eligible, members retain access even after changing employment, relocating, or retiring. The institution offers a referral program rewarding members $25 per successful referral and new members up to $100 for joining. Its not-for-profit structure allows it to pass savings to members through higher dividend rates and lower loan rates compared to traditional banks.

Gallup FCU is best suited for current and former Gallup employees and their families seeking competitive rates and personalized service. The membership restriction significantly limits accessibility for the general public. Stated loan rates require qualifying credit, meaning actual rates may vary considerably. The website provides limited detail on deposit insurance limits, account features, or comprehensive fee structures beyond the direct deposit benefit.
services: Savings accounts with rates from 0.75% to 2.25% APY
Certificates of deposit (CDs) with competitive rates
Checking accounts with fee waiver for $1,000+ monthly direct deposits
Auto loan refinancing with rate beat guarantee
Mortgage lending for home purchase and refinance
Financial planning and wealth management services
Member referral program ($25 per referral, up to $100 for new members)
pros: Not-for-profit structure passes savings to members through higher dividend rates on savings accounts and lower loan rates on loans
Lifetime membership—eligibility continues after job change, relocation, or retirement, provided initial eligibility criteria were met
No monthly fees with direct deposits of $1,000 or more, eliminating common banking expenses
Auto loan refinancing guarantee to beat current rate by 1.00% APR or offer best qualifying rate
Referral program pays $25 per member referred and up to $100 for new members joining
Membership extends to immediate family members of Gallup employees, expanding access beyond direct employees
Comprehensive financial wellness resources including budgeting guidance, financial planning, and home buying education
cons: Membership is strictly limited to Gallup employees and immediate family—the general public cannot join regardless of creditworthiness
Loan rates listed are baseline rates for well-qualified members; actual rates vary by credit score, term, and loan type, potentially differing significantly
Website lacks detailed information on deposit insurance coverage, specific account features, minimum balances, or comprehensive fee schedules
Limited mention of digital banking capabilities, mobile app availability, or remote account access options
No stated information about overdraft protection, checking account interest rates, or alternative products beyond the highlighted offerings
best_for: Current and former Gallup employees seeking low-rate personal loans, auto refinancing, or mortgages
Gallup employee families looking for fee-free checking and higher-yield savings accounts
Employees planning long-term financial relationships, as lifetime membership provides stability across job transitions
Individuals seeking credit union benefits (lower rates, not-for-profit mission) who have Gallup employment eligibility
diagnosis: Gallup FCU is ideal for current and former Gallup employees and their families seeking low-cost, member-owned banking with competitive rates and no-fee checking. The primary caveat is strict membership eligibility: only Gallup employees and immediate family members can join, making this institution inaccessible to the general public.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
